notes: Mixed symbol block: 2 WIPEOUT masks + nested 국기계양대(flagpole) INSERT + 20 LINEs forming a notched border box with an inner 1176x50 double-line bar; bbox only 1220x126.

rationale.evidence: Content is mixed: 2 WIPEOUT (handles 57AC-57AD) that mask underlying graphics, 1 nested INSERT to block X-평면도(기본형)$0$국기계양대 (a flagpole/국기계양대 marker), and 20 LINEs. The LINEs form an outer notched border at x=+/-610/+/-600 (57B4/57BA/57BC/57C2) enclosing an inner 1176x50 rectangle whose long edges 57AF and 57B1 are duplicated by 57BF/57B7. Overall bbox is only 1220x126.
rationale.rule: A compact block that combines WIPEOUT masks, a named nested marker block, and a bordered frame is an annotation symbol/marker rather than raw plan geometry; WIPEOUT is a masking device used by symbols/callouts and never by structural wall linework.
rationale.counterfactual: Remove the WIPEOUTs and the nested 국기계양대 INSERT and replace the border with long parallel wall pairs on a wall layer, and this would read as 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood; adding an attribute/text would push it to a pure label symbol.
rationale.uncertainty: Without the nested block's own geometry I cannot fully confirm it is a flagpole marker versus a tiny plan detail, and the coincident-duplicated 50-thick bar may be a base curb rather than a wall; drawing units/scale are also unverifiable from this projection.

rationale.evidence: All 23 entities are 5-vertex closed LWPOLYLINE on layer X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL (insulation), across sampled handles 7F38-7F4E; there are zero LINE/INSERT/WIPEOUT entities and no bbox is derivable, so the block is a uniform single-purpose insulation cluster rather than mixed plan content.
rationale.rule: A block whose entities lie entirely on a dedicated insulation (INSUL) layer represents wall-cavity insulation — real 평면도 geometry, not a symbol, dimension, or furniture; insulation hugs walls so it indicates their location but is not itself wall face/centerline linework.
rationale.counterfactual: Had these polylines sat on a wall/structural layer (WALL, 구조벽) or appeared as long parallel 2-vertex LINE pairs, wall_likelihood would climb above 0.5 and individual wall handles would be listed; a mix of text/leader entities would instead push toward 심볼/치수캐시.
